name: Royal Heir's Gambit: Daddy Bows
original_name: 萌宝荣耀之父王从了妈咪吧
overview: Mo Si Chen killed the princess due to a misunderstanding in ancient times, and he has always felt guilty. He accidentally traveled to the modern era with his son and met a woman who looked like the princess. He also looks the same as the second son of the Mo family, who was framed to death and was regarded as the heir.

trailers.title: 古代王爺帶娃意外穿越，見義勇為救下美女总裁，竟被她當場以身相許！
